mapper.insert: insert into user (name, openid, create_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{openid}, #{createTime})

insert into user ( name, openid, phone, gender, id_number, preference_completed, current_flight_id, create_time ) values ( #{name}, #{openid}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{idNumber}, #{preferenceCompleted}, #{currentFlightId}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select u.id as userId, ifnull(u.name, concat('旅客', u.id)) as name, u.id_number as idNumber, case when u.id_number is not null and length(u.id_number) = 18 then timestampdiff(year, str_to_date(substring(u.id_number, 7, 8), '%Y%m%d'), curdate()) else null end as age, u.phone as phone, case when u.gender = 1 then '男' when u.gender = 0 then '女' else '未知' end as gender, case when exists( select 1 from user_preference up where up.user_id = u.id ) then 1 else 0 end as preferenceCompleted, case when u.current_flight_id is not null then '已绑定' else '未绑定' end as bindStatus, case when exists( select 1 from meal_selection ms where ms.user_id = u.id and ms.flight_id = #{flightId} ) then '已选餐' else '未选餐' end as mealSelected from user u where u.current_flight_id = #{flightId} order by u.id desc
select distinct fi.* from user u inner join flight_info fi on fi.id = u.current_flight_id where u.id_number = #{idNumber} order by fi.departure_time desc, fi.id desc
